evals.prompt: Review the TypeScript code in server.ts and report any security, architecture, or code-quality issues you find. Provide a written report with severity ratings (HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW), evidence (file + line), and recommended fixes.
assertions: Detects SQL injection in /users/search (string interpolation into query) as HIGH
Detects hardcoded Stripe API key (STRIPE_API_KEY constant) as HIGH
Does NOT flag /users/:id (parameterized query) as SQL-injection vulnerable

evals.prompt: Review the Python code in auth.py and report any security, architecture, or code-quality issues you find. Provide a written report with severity ratings (HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW), evidence (file + line), and recommended fixes.
assertions: Detects use of MD5 for password hashing as HIGH
Detects hardcoded master-reset token ('master-reset-2024') as HIGH
Detects missing authentication on /admin/delete-user endpoint as HIGH
Detects timing-attack vulnerability in password comparison (== instead of hmac.compare_digest) as MEDIUM or higher
Detects debug=True + host 0.0.0.0 as HIGH or MEDIUM

evals.prompt: Review the Go code in counter.go and report any security, architecture, or code-quality issues you find. Provide a written report with severity ratings (HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW), evidence (file + line), and recommended fixes.
assertions: Detects command injection in pingHandler (shell concatenation of req.Host) as HIGH
Detects data race on global counter variable in incrementHandler as HIGH or MEDIUM
Detects XSS in profileHandler (unescaped name in HTML) as HIGH
Detects unchecked json.Unmarshal / io.ReadAll errors as MEDIUM or LOW
